description: Manual combat-log observation by the repository owner. Raw combat log has not yet been archived in the repository. Observation: Malachite appeared as a recipient of Warden's Rally Recovery, confirming that "3 Allies" includes the caster for this effect.
title: Warden's Rally Recovery included Malachite

description: Manual combat-log observation by the repository owner. Observation: Warrior's Zeal increased Vermax's own Basic Attack Physical Damage, confirming that its unqualified Physical Damage Dealt modifier is not limited to Commands and Habits.
title: Warrior's Zeal affected Vermax Basic Attack Physical Damage

description: Manual combat-log observation by the repository owner. Observation: when selecting a new Prey, Sheepstealer prioritized an eligible enemy that received Recovery during the previous round. This applies only when no current Prey exists.
title: Wild Hunt prioritized an enemy that received Recovery last round

description: Repeated manual ability-text review confirms that Other Ally and Other Allies exclude the caster, while plain Ally and Allies allow the caster to be selected when spatial targeting rules permit it.
title: Ally and Other Ally targeting-language convention
